StringData.String: {%name%}'s hero, {%hero_name%}, is now a Level {%level%} {%class%} in Dragon Age Legends.
Your hero has begun a quest. Would you like to boast about it on your wall?
{%name%}'s hero has begun the quest {%quest_name%} in Dragon Age Legends.
{%name%}'s hero, {%hero_name%}, completed {%quest_name%} in Dragon Age Legends.
Your friend's hero has aided you in battle. Would you like to share the news on your friend's wall?
Your hero aided {%name%} in battle in Dragon Age Legends.\n{%name%} has a reward for you at {%gender%} castle.
You defeated the demons from the shade. Brag to the world!
{%hero_name%} slayed the shade demons in Dragon Age Legends.\nTake that!
{%name%} honors {%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, who fought valiantly by {%gender%} side in Dragon Age Legends.
{%name%} thanks {%friend_name%} for sending them {%amount%} gold in Dragon Age Legends.
{%name%} thanks {%friend_name%} for {%friend_gender%} generous gift in Dragon Age Legends.
{%name%} congratulates {%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, for reaching level {%friend_level%} in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%} welcomes {%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, to their legendary adventure.
{%name%} wants to know how {%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, improved after the re-spec in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%} knows you let them fall in battle!
{%name%} asks that {%friend_name%}'s hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, take better care of their allies in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%}’s hero, {%hero_name%}, was summoned from rest when {%friend_hero_name%} called them into battle in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%} added {%friend_hero_name%} to their guild, {%guild_name%}, in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%} removed your hero, {%friend_hero_name%}, from their guild in Dragon Age Legends!
We’re Getting The Guild Mate Bonus!
{%hero_name%} and {%friend_hero_name%} are slaying more Darkspawn with 25% shorter rest times because they are in each other’s guilds in Dragon Age Legends!
{%name%} formed a new guild named {%guild_name%} in Dragon Age Legends!
{%friend_name%}, my forces successfully repelled your attack during Guild vs. Guild combat in Dragon Age Legends! Will you challenge me again?
Good work, {%friend_name%}! Your score against my guild during Guild vs. Guild combat is impressive. Now try to best it!
Careful, {%friend_name%}. You're now my nemesis in Dragon Age Legends' Guild vs. Guild combat. I'm coming after you next!
{%name%} just received 72 hours of double XP for finishing their first Guild vs. Guild battle in Dragon Age Legends!
Try out Guild vs. Guild for the first time and you'll get the same perk!
{%friend_name%}, come back to Dragon Age Legends so we can play Guild vs. Guild together!
I just unlocked {%bossName%}’s raid. Do you have the skills to do the same?
Join my raid to earn epic loot!
Time is running out! Help me battle against {%raidName%} in Dragon Age Legends and you’ll share in the epic rewards.
I’ve defeated the last enemy camp guarding {%bossName%}. Attack before it’s too late!
I just defeated {%bossName%}’s raid and won a {%medalStr%} medal. Can you do better?
I just participated in {%bossName%}’s raid. Can you do better?
{%myName%} just annihilated your high score against {%challengedFriendName%} during Guild vs. Guild combat in Dragon Age Legends. Reclaim your title now!
{%myName%} just became your nemesis in Dragon Age Legends' Guild vs. Guild combat. Retaliate now to defend your honor!
{%myName%} just fought their way to the #1 spot on {%challengedFriendName%}'s Guild vs. Guild leaderboard in Dragon Age Legends! Can you beat their score?
{%myName%} just achieved their personal high score against you in Dragon Age Legends' Guild vs. Guild combat. Will you return the favor?
{%challengedFriendName%}, I overwhelmed your forces during Guild vs. Guild combat in Dragon Age Legends and racked up {%score%} points. Will you fight back?
{%challengedFriendName%}, your forces managed to withstand my attack during Guild vs. Guild combat in Dragon Age Legends. Next time, you won't be so lucky!
I won {%item_name%} playing the daily bonus game in Dragon Age Legends. What prize will you receive?
I won {%item_name%} playing the daily bonus game in Dragon Age Legends. What prize will you receive?
I won {%item_name%} playing the daily bonus game in Dragon Age Legends. What prize will you receive?
